route.name: Par 3 on the Devil (Dec 2021) Copy By dirtyfreehub.org
route.description: This is a publicly available route created by someone other than Spinistry. We can not attest to the accuracy of the route or any current conditions. Please only use this a a general reference tool for your adventures.
